topics: Generalized Block Diagram of Instrumentation System
Static and Dynamic Characteristics of Transducers
Errors in Measurements and its Analysis
Measurement of Resistance, Capacitance and Inductance
Maxwell's Inductance Bridge and Maxwell's Inductance-Capacitance Bridge
Measuring Circuits and Applications of Resistance Transducers
Strain Gauge (Gauge Factor Derivation), Strain Gauge Load Cell, Resistance Thermometer (2-Wire, 3-Wire and 4-Wire), Thermistor
Capacitive Transducers - Variable Air Gap, Variable Area, Variable Permittivity Types
Types and Applications of Thermocouple (Cold Junction Compensation)
Working and Torque Equations of PMMC

Suggestion on Project Topics - Note: 1. The project proposal submitted by each group (4 to 8 students) must include a measurement system, which can be either analog or digital. 2. The sensor calibration is mandatory. 3. Students can incorporate suitable signal conditioning circuits, communication standards or display devices in the project work. They can evaluate the outputs and run necessary analytics on the data generated. 4. Sample projects: a. Implementation of a temperature transducer for low temperature measurement, b. Wind measurement system using anemometers, c. Vibration measurement using accelerometers
